title: Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections
excerpt:
## Summary
- Fix motion detection being cleared after 500ms by IAS Zone conflicting with Tuya DP1 (now holds 30-120s correctly)
- Add one-time battery read via ZCL PowerConfiguration + Tuya dataQuery after device init
- Fix HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI config: battery flags, humidity scaling (multiplierâ†’divisor), add missing DP mappings

## Details

The `_TZE200_rhgsbacq` (HOBEIAN 10G Radar Multi-Sensor) pairs to `presence_sensor_radar` and identifies at Zigbee level as `_tz3000_8bxrzyxz`, using the `ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR` config.

**IAS Motion conflict (main fix):**
The device sends DP1=true (motion detected) via Tuya cluster, but ~500ms later the IAS Zone sends a false notification that immediately clears the motion state. Added `noIasMotion` config flag that skips IAS Zone motion handling when DP1 is the authoritative source. Applied to both `ZG_204ZV_MULTISENSOR` and `HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI` configs.

**Battery (never reported):**
Battery mode devices only use passive listeners - no active queries. Added a delayed (5s) one-time `readAttributes` on PowerConfiguration cluster + Tuya `dataQuery()` to retrieve battery and all DPs after init.

**HOBEIAN_10G_MULTI config (for alternate firmware):**
- `battery: false` â†’ `true`, `mainsPowered: true` â†’ `false`
- DP101 humidity: `multiplier: 10` â†’ `divisor: 10`
- Added DP110 (battery), DP2 (sensitivity), DP102 (fading_time)

## Test plan
- [x] Fresh-paired `_TZE200_rhgsbacq` on HP23
- [x] Motion holds 30-120s (was 500ms), IAS signals logged as SKIPPED
- [x] Battery reads 100% via ZCL PowerConfiguration
- [x] Humidity 45%, Temperature 24.6Â°C, Luminance real-time
- [x] No impact on other presence_sensor_radar devices
